subject: [PATCH 12/14] nfsd: add netlink upcall for the nfsd.fh cache

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch adds netlink-based cache upcall support for the NFS server's expkey (nfsd.fh) cache, allowing clients to notify the server of changes to cached file handles. The patch introduces a new attribute set and operations for expkey cache management, including dumping pending requests and updating the cache with client-provided information. It also wires up the expkey_notify callback to trigger multicast events when cache misses occur. This change follows the pattern established by existing svc_export netlink support and is intended to improve the efficiency of NFS server caching.
